outputs.description: A list of malicious URLs identified by the lastline analysis. URL.Malicious.Vendor The vendor that determined that a URL is malicious.
outputs.name: URL.Data

outputs.description: The reason that the vendor determined that the URL is malicious. URL.Malicious.Score The score that the malicious URL received from the vendor.
outputs.name: URL.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: The MD5 hash of the file. File.SHA1 The SHA1 hash of the file.
outputs.name: File.MD5

outputs.description: The SHA256 hash of the file. File.Type The file type.
outputs.name: File.SHA256

outputs.description: The vendor that determined that the file is malicious. File.Malicious.Description The reason that the vendor determined that the file is malicious.
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Vendor

outputs.description: The score that the malicious file received from the vendor. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: File.Malicious.Score

outputs.description: The type of indicator. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type

outputs.description: The actual score. Lastline.Submission.Status The status of the submission.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Score

outputs.description: The task UUID. Lastline.Submission.SubmissionTime The timestamp in Lastline.
outputs.name: Lastline.Submission.UUID

outputs.description: Yara signatures name. Lastline.Submission.YaraSignatures.score The score according to the Yara signatures (0 to 100).
outputs.name: Lastline.Submission.YaraSignatures.name

outputs.description: Whether the signature is for internal use only. Lastline.Submission.DNSqueries List of DNS queries executed by the analysis subject.
outputs.name: Lastline.Submission.YaraSignatures.internal

outputs.description: A list of network connections executed by the analysis subject. Lastline.Submission.DownloadedFiles A list of files that were downloaded using the Microsoft Windows file-download API functions. Each element is a tuple of file-origin URL and a File element.
outputs.name: Lastline.Submission.NetworkConnections

outputs.description: Information on athe Windows process. Lastline.Submission.Process.arguments The argument of the process.
outputs.name: Lastline.Submission.Process

outputs.description: The executable of the process. Lastline.Submission.Process.executable.abs_path The absolute path of the executable of the process.
outputs.name: Lastline.Submission.Process.executable

outputs.description: The filename of the executable. Lastline.Submission.Process.executable.yara_signature_hits The Yara signature of the executable of the process.
outputs.name: Lastline.Submission.Process.executable.filename

outputs.description: The executable information of the process. Lastline.Submission.Process.process_id The process ID.
outputs.name: Lastline.Submission.Process.executable.ext_info
